title: BetterWaystonesMenu
description: Enhances the Waystones' mod selection menu
body:
### 1.19.2 and 1.20 are unplanned for now

A [**Waystones**](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) addon that enhances the waystone selection menu with a variety of features :
- scroll bar for waystones
- search box (clearable with right click)
- sorting modes
- switch back to old UI
- extra waystone informations holding CTRL while hovering a waystone button
- full parity with the old menu
- ability to drag and drop waystones to swap them (swap because it's a limitation with the waystones mod)
- enhanced accessibility

It's also a pure client mod, not required on the server.

![Menu preview](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/DffzSFhj/images/25f7b9137891baa348b04339b5d7734bb1ee69f5.jpeg)

### You like what I do? Consider supporting me on my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Loxoz) so I can continue to make and update Minecraft mods like this!
